questions: Do any merge conflict markers remain in the listed conflicted file (src/tickets/index.ts)?

answers.answer: No conflict markers remain in src/tickets/index.ts. Grep for <<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>> returned zero matches. The file is 149 lines with 10 subcommands including both ticket (HLX-342 CLI improvements) and staging additions.
evidence: Grep scan of src/tickets/index.ts: no matches for conflict marker patterns
File is 149 lines with list, latest, get, create, update-description, rerun, continue, artifacts, artifact, bundle subcommands
Scout reference-map: 'No conflict markers (<<<<<<< / ======= / >>>>>>>) remain in index.ts'

statement: The merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts (HLX-342 CLI ticket improvements vs staging) is already resolved. No conflict markers remain. The CLI has no involvement in library credential routing. No code changes needed.
